title: sofium
body:
# Welcome to the Sofium Modpack!

## Description

This modpack is safe for use in both singleplayer and multiplayer. You are able to install your favorite mods on top of Fabric and Quilt, including Architectury API and Cloth Config API. Additionally, Fabric Language Kotlin is installed to support other mods.
Here are some mods you may already know that are part of this modpack: E4MC, Zoomify, and Dashloader.


## Disclaimer:

This modpack is still in the alpha stage of development.


[Description Written by Nu-Rinth](https://modrinth.com/user/nurinth)
